name: copilot-bridge
description: Reuse authorized local Copilot conversations or consult signed-in Microsoft 365 Copilot through the local Copilot Bridge.

interface.shortDescription: Reuse authorized Copilot history or ask for a second opinion.
interface.longDescription: Lets Codex search and read explicitly authorized local Copilot projects, and uses the signed-in Microsoft 365 Copilot tab in the user's daily Edge profile for explicit consultations.
defaultPrompt: Ask Copilot to review this design, then adjudicate its advice.
Check whether this implementation is overengineered.
